warning_observed_note: engine OFF — no APF intervention; chat completed naturally with answer rendered

summary_3_lines: c2s: POST https://www.notion.so/api/v3/runInferenceTranscript, body=application/json with keys [traceId, spaceId, threadId, transcript[list], threadParentPointer, createThread, debugOverrides, generateTitle, saveAllThreadOperations, setUnreadState, createdSource, threadType, isPartialTranscript, asPatchResponse, hasHeartbeat]

s2c: Content-Type=application/x-ndjson, framing=newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON, one JSON object per line, NOT SSE, NOT WSS for inference), 20 frames total for 1+1=?, content path = type==patch with v[].o=='a' / v[].p path operations applying to thread record (patch-start opens, patch frames stream updates, terminal frame type=='record-map' commits)

termination: terminal frame {type:'record-map', recordMap:{...thread/<threadId>:{...}}} — request stream completes by simple HTTP body close after record-map frame; no DONE sentinel, no [DONE] marker. Correlation IDs: traceId (UUID v4), threadId (UUID, persists in URL ?t=<threadId no hyphens>), spaceId (UUID). Same threadId used in subsequent markInferenceTranscriptSeen.

c2s_request.auth: cookie-based (notion_user_id, token_v2, notion_browser_id, etc. via Cookie header)

body_key_values_sample.threadId: 3659aa2d-8bdd-80e6-b9e9-00a92e2d4b3a (UUID, persists across turns, mirrored to URL ?t=...)

c2s_request.user_prompt_location: body.transcript[*] (likely user message embedded in transcript list)

s2c_response.framing: NDJSON — one complete JSON object per line, separated by \n
s2c_response.transport: HTTP/2 streaming response (chunked or unbounded body, single request/response, NOT WSS, NOT SSE)

type=patch-start.purpose: opens the streaming patch session, declares initial agent-instruction-state
type=patch-start.shape: {type:'patch-start', data:{s:[{id, type:'agent-instruction-state', owner, root, sources, selectedSkillPageIds, trackedInstructionTreePages}]}, version:1}

type=patch.purpose: incremental updates — each frame contains an array of JSON-Patch-like ops applied to the agent state slot tree

type=record-map.purpose: TERMINAL FRAME — commits final thread/recordMap to client store; signals end of stream
type=record-map.shape: {type:'record-map', recordMap:{__version__:3, thread:{<threadId>:{spaceId, value:{value:{id, version, space_id, messages, ...}}}}}}

s2c_response.content_text_location_for_assistant_answ: buried inside patch frames where v[].v.type indicates message/agent-turn record; assistant text content streams progressively inside agent-turn / tool-result subtree (need to walk patch ops to /s/<idx>/messages to reconstruct visible text)

termination_signal.mechanism: presence of a frame with type='record-map' followed by HTTP body close (no [DONE] sentinel, no event:end)
termination_signal.heartbeat_field_in_c2s: hasHeartbeat:false — server omits keepalive frames for this request

correlation_ids.traceId: per-request UUID v4 in c2s body, also embedded in agent-tool-result frames in s2c (visible at frames[2].v[0].v.traceId == c2s.traceId)
correlation_ids.threadId: stable across turns; same value in c2s.threadId, URL query ?t=<threadId stripped of hyphens>, s2c record-map.recordMap.thread key, markInferenceTranscriptSeen.threadId
correlation_ids.spaceId: tenant/workspace UUID, present in c2s.spaceId, s2c record-map.recordMap.thread[].spaceId, markInferenceTranscriptSeen.spaceId
correlation_ids.additional_per-frame_ids: each patch.v[].v carries its own UUID id (record IDs for tools/messages/titles)

ancillary_endpoints_observed.POST https://www.notion.so/api/v3/markIn: after stream completes, body={spaceId, threadId} — marks turn as read
ancillary_endpoints_observed.POST https://www.notion.so/api/v3/etClie: telemetry/event-tracking client (NOT inference — used for product analytics)
ancillary_endpoints_observed.POST https://exp.notion.so/v1/rgstr: Notion exp(eriment) registrar — feature flag / sampling
ancillary_endpoints_observed.WSS wss://msgstore-001.www.notion.so/pri: Primus / Engine.IO v4 WebSocket — used for collaborative realtime sync (block updates, presence), NOT for chat inference streaming. 145 ws frames observed during the whole session — these are heartbeats and realtime block sync, not the assistant answer.

notes.key_finding_vs_hypothesis: Task brief referenced 'response_type=notion_ndjson_v6b_identity'. CONFIRMED: response IS NDJSON (application/x-ndjson) over HTTP/2 POST response body — the v6b/identity naming is internal but the wire format is plain NDJSON. NOT WebSocket for inference. Primus WSS exists but is for realtime collaboration sync, orthogonal to the inference channel.
notes.block_strategy_implications: APF can intercept the c2s POST to https://www.notion.so/api/v3/runInferenceTranscript and either (a) block at request (return 403) — would surface as HTTP error in browser, or (b) replace the NDJSON response body with a single record-map frame containing a synthetic 'agent-tool-result' or 'message' record carrying the warning text. Option (b) is cleaner because UI is designed to render whatever record-map says. The body.transcript field carries the user prompt for content inspection.
